content: Permission system architecture: PermissionPrompt.tsx renders in BottomComposer.tsx. In split mode, each pane has its own pendingPermission state — pane 0 via manager.pendingPermission, pane 1 via pane1.pendingPermission. Both are passed independently in AppLayout.tsx (lines 715 and 876). The PermissionPrompt component receives {request, onRespond, showAcceptForSession}. Split mode is detected via settings.splitMode in AppLayout.tsx line 418. Secondary pane managed by useSecondaryPane hook which runs independent engine hooks (useClaude/useACP/useCodex/useOpenClaw).

{"pattern":"Harnss split mode: each pane has independent engine hooks and independent pendingPermission. PermissionPrompt is rendered inside BottomComposer per-pane. To show a tab switcher on approval, modify PermissionPrompt to accept a splitMode prop and pane labels, then show a toggle when splitMode=true.","type":"architecture","confidence":0.95,"metadata":{"project":"harnss","feature":"ED-004","files":["src/components/PermissionPrompt.tsx","src/components/BottomComposer.tsx","src/components/AppLayout.tsx","src/hooks/useSecondaryPane.ts"]},"timestamp":"2026-03-16T18:22:07.072Z"}

{"pattern":"ED-004 implemented: PaneSwitcher component in PermissionPrompt.tsx shows Tab 1 | Tab 2 toggle in split mode. BottomComposer passes splitMode, paneIndex, otherPanePendingPermission, onFocusOtherPane. AppLayout wires pane0 with handleFocusPane1 and pane1 with handleFocusPane0. Amber dot indicator shows when other pane has pending permission.","type":"implementation","confidence":0.95,"metadata":{"project":"harnss","feature":"ED-004","status":"completed","files_modified":["src/components/PermissionPrompt.tsx","src/components/BottomComposer.tsx","src/components/AppLayout.tsx"]},"timestamp":"2026-03-16T18:28:07.491Z"}

ED-004 implementation: OS notifications show [Tab 1] or [Tab 2] prefix in split mode. useNotifications hook accepts paneLabel and onNotificationClick. useAppOrchestrator calls useNotifications twice in split mode — once for pane 0 (Tab 1) and once for pane 1 (Tab 2). Clicking the notification focuses the window AND activates the correct pane via handleFocusPane. Files: useNotifications.ts, useAppOrchestrator.ts

{"pattern":"ED-004 correct implementation: notifications (not PermissionPrompt UI) show Tab 1/Tab 2 in split mode. useNotifications takes paneLabel and onNotificationClick. Orchestrator calls hook twice — one per pane. notification.onclick focuses window + correct pane.","type":"implementation","confidence":0.95,"metadata":{"project":"harnss","feature":"ED-004","files":["src/hooks/useNotifications.ts","src/hooks/useAppOrchestrator.ts"]},"timestamp":"2026-03-16T18:36:11.064Z"}

OpenClaw connects via WebSocket to a gateway server. Default URL: ws://127.0.0.1:18789 (localhost only). Configured via AppSettings.openclawGatewayUrl. Authentication uses Ed25519 device identity (stored in openacpui-data/openclaw-device-identity.json), gateway token, and device token. The sessionKey format is agent:{agentId}:editor-{projectName}. Server has nginx proxying port 5000 → 127.0.0.1:18789 with WebSocket upgrade support. Critical: gateway only listens on 127.0.0.1 — requires either SSH tunnel, VPN (Tailscale at 100.114.95.23), or nginx reverse proxy on external interface.

OpenClaw cross-machine issues: 1) Gateway URL defaults to ws://127.0.0.1:18789 — must be configured per machine. Server sofi (100.114.95.23) has nginx on port 5000 proxying to 18789 with WebSocket support. 2) Device identity is machine-specific (Ed25519 keypair) — each machine must pair independently. 3) SessionKey uses project folder basename — works cross-machine if folder names match. 4) nginx needs map $http_upgrade $connection_upgrade block. 5) Ports: gateway=18789(localhost), nginx=5000(0.0.0.0), tailscale=443/8443.

{"pattern":"OpenClaw cross-machine fix: improved error messages in openclaw:status handler to detect default localhost URL and suggest configuring Gateway URL in Settings → Advanced. WebSocket connection ws://100.114.95.23:5000 confirmed working via nginx proxy. Nginx config already has map $http_upgrade for WebSocket support.","type":"bugfix","confidence":0.95,"metadata":{"project":"harnss","feature":"openclaw-cross-machine","files":["electron/src/ipc/openclaw-sessions.ts"]},"timestamp":"2026-03-16T21:21:10.683Z"}

{"pattern":"OpenClaw \"planning next moves\" hang: caused by empty agentId generating malformed sessionKey \"agent::editor-{project}\". Gateway rejects with \"Malformed agent session key; refusing workspace resolution\". Fix: fallback agentId to \"default\" when openclawDefaultAgent is empty. Two locations: ensureConnection (line 482) and openclaw:start handler (line 843).","type":"bugfix","confidence":0.98,"metadata":{"project":"harnss","feature":"openclaw-session-key-fix","root_cause":"empty agentId in sessionKey","server_error":"Malformed agent session key","file":"electron/src/ipc/openclaw-sessions.ts"},"timestamp":"2026-03-17T06:59:34.541Z"}

{"feature":"Multi-Agent Group Debate System","status":"planning","concepts":{"AgentSlot":"Engine + model + agentId config for one participant","AgentGroup":"Named collection of AgentSlots with a designated leader","GroupSession":"Running debate session where agents take turns responding","Leader":"Agent that synthesizes final output from group responses","TurnOrder":"round-robin | leader-decides | parallel"},"engines":{"claude":"Multiple models simultaneously (sonnet, opus, haiku)","codex":"Multiple models via Codex API","openclaw":"Multiple agents (sofi, maya, lex, kai, etc.) via gateway","acp":"ACP protocol agents"},"architecture_layers":{"shared_types":"shared/types/groups.ts — AgentSlot, AgentGroup, GroupMessage, GroupSession","main_process":"electron/src/ipc/group-sessions.ts — orchestration, turn management, message routing","renderer_hooks":"src/hooks/useAgentGroups.ts — group CRUD, session state, message flow","ui_components":"src/components/groups/ — GroupPanel, GroupChat, GroupConfig, AgentSlotCard"}}
